revision.comment: Bot: create category from JA/Wikidata
revision.text:
[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]][[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[ja:Category:21世紀日本の小説家]] [[ar:Category:روائيون يابانيون في القرن 21]] [[azb:Category:۲۱. یوز ایلده ژاپونلو رومانچیلار]] [[ckb:Category:ڕۆماننووسەکانی ژاپۆن لە سەدەی ٢١ەم]] [[es:Category:Novelistas de Japón del siglo XXI]] [[fa:Category:رمان‌نویسان سده ۲۱ (میلادی) اهل ژاپن]] [[fr:Category:Romancier japonais du XXIe siècle]] [[hy:Category:21-րդ դարի ճապոնացի վիպասաններ]] [[ka:Category:XXI საუკუნის იაპონელი რომანისტები]] [[tr:Category:21. yüzyıl Japon roman yazarları]] [[ur:Category:اکیسویں صدی کے جاپانی ناول نگار]]
This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[Ken'ichi Tanigawa]].

revision.comment: Bot: tidy cats/IWs; add JA prose & tracking
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: remove obsolete category Moved jawiki pages
Bot: remove obsolete category Tier 1 Categories
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Bot: prepend JA text, fix translated-page + cats
Text replacement - "]]|version=" to "|version="
Text replacement - "デフォルトソート:" to "citation needed|"
Text replacement - "This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on [[" to "[[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on "
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Text replacement - "↵.↵" to ""
Bot: move cats/inter-wikis/translated-page to bottom
Bot: replace with clean JA/Local structure
Text replacement - "]]}}↵{{translated page|ja|" to "}} {{translated page|ja|"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]][[category:Categories created from enwiki title]]"
Text replacement - "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories created from enwiki title]]" to "[[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] <!--this is here to get the bot to work--> "
Bot: tag as missing wikidata (no wikidata found via interwikis)
Bot: add wikidata links from interwikis (Q9645770)
Bot: remove [[Category:categories missing wikidata]] (has wikidata link)
Text replacement - "↵↵↵" to " "

imported only latest revision from https://archive.org/details/miraheze-wiki-shintowiki-20251218 to avoid excessive disk usage, comment on the revision was Bot: reorganize categories (alphabetical, deduplicated, moved to bottom)
adding dummy category to make categories work
Bot: Adding dummy category to make categories work after wiki restoration
Text replacement - "[[Category:pages]]" to "[[Category:Categories]]"
Text replacement - "[[sn:" to "[[Category:sn_crud|TEST"
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Categories created from enwiki title]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: remove [[Category:Original categories]] (crud category cleanup)
Bot: normalize category page structure (templates/interwikis/categories only)
revision.text: <!--templates--> {{各世紀日本の小説家}} {{CategoryTOC}} {{デフォルトソート:にほんしようせつか}} {{citation needed|にほんしようせつか}} {{translated page|1=ja|2=Category:21世紀日本の小説家}} {{translated page|ja|Category:21世紀日本の小説家|version=91642307}} {{wikidata link|Q9645770}} <!--interwikis--> [[ar:Category:روائيون يابانيون في القرن 21]] [[azb:Category:۲۱. یوز ایلده ژاپونلو رومانچیلار]] [[ckb:Category:ڕۆماننووسەکانی ژاپۆن لە سەدەی ٢١ەم]] [[es:Category:Novelistas de Japón del siglo XXI]] [[fa:Category:رمان‌نویسان سده ۲۱ (میلادی) اهل ژاپن]] [[fr:Category:Romancier japonais du XXIe siècle]] [[hy:Category:21-րդ դարի ճապոնացի վիպասաններ]] [[ja:Category:21世紀日本の小説家]] [[ka:Category:XXI საუკუნის იაპონელი რომანისტები]] [[tr:Category:21. yüzyıl Japon roman yazarları]] [[ur:Category:اکیسویں صدی کے جاپانی ناول نگار]] <!--categories--> [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Ken'ichi Tanigawa]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese explanatory text to translate to english]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with enwiki]] [[Category:Tier 3 Categories]]
